name: Baker's Square French Silk Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 small box instant chocolate pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the small box instant pudding using buttermilk instead of milk; set aside.
2. Prepare the Knox gelatin with 1/4 cup cold water in a glass measuring cup.
3. Use a pot or pan of hot water to dissolve the gelatine mixture while still in the cup.
4. Dissolve the gelatine completely when the mixture is clear.
5. Wire whisk the dissolved gelatine into the pudding and fold in 9 oz cool whip.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust and chill.
7. Apply whipped cream on top before serving.
8. Garnish with chocolate shavings.
